message: fix: document to_agent empty fallback and use parent session as last resort

files.patch:
@@ -21,8 +21,12 @@ subagent_session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.subagent_session_id // .child_sess
 reason=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.reason // "completed"')
 ts=$(now_ms)
 
-# Build the to_agent identifier: use subagent context_id if we have it
-to_agent="$subagent_session_id"
+# Build the to_agent identifier: use subagent context_id if we have it.
+# If subagent_session_id is absent from the payload, to_agent will be the parent
+# session_id as a last resort so the record is always queryable.
+# cxdb accepts any non-empty string here; use "context:<id>" form when known.
+# Verify the actual field name against a live SubagentStop payload.
+to_agent="${subagent_session_id:-$session_id}"
 if [ -n "$subagent_session_id" ]; then
   sub_cid=$(get_context_id "$subagent_session_id")
   [ -n "$sub_cid" ] && to_agent="context:$sub_cid"
